description: Canonical registry of every valid scene_type. scene-director MUST pick from this list. asset-director and compose-director MUST validate cuts against this registry. If a beat needs a motif not listed here, request a new component before continuing.

text_card.description: Large-typography beat with optional background. Use for declarative single-line statements.
anti_patterns: narration duplication: do not put the same line in `text` AND in subtitles

hero_title.description: Title or end card with optional subtitle.

stat_card.description: A single big number with optional subtitle.

anime_scene.description: Still-image anime scene with particles and camera motion. AD-VIDEO RESTRICTION: do NOT use for hook/product/brand beats — use notification_scene/dashboard_scene/brand_card instead.

notification_scene.description: Animated app-icon grid with spring-entrance icons, badge counters, and notification banners. Use for hook/chaos beats.

creator_workflow_scene.description: Product-visible creator workflow scene with approved product image, animated timeline, floating workflow chips, progress rails, and connection lines. Use for premium hardware ads where generic notification/browser metaphors feel too static or unrelated. The visible product must come from productImage; do not substitute generic hardware.

dashboard_scene.description: Animated product-UI: sidebar items spring in, task cards scale up, toast slides from right. Use for product-reveal beats.

brand_card.description: Animated end card: letter spring, accent underline draw, tagline fade, CTA, wordmark pulse. Use for CTA/brand beats. Text-only by default; render an approved product only when productImage is provided, and render synthetic laptop hardware only when hardwareTreatment is explicitly set.

terminal_scene.description: Synthetic terminal animation — no real screen capture needed.

checkmark_scene.description: Mint checkmark SVG draw + radial ripple + spring pop. The first moment of visual resolution. Use when a task/project completes or a value lands.

browser_tabs_scene.description: Synthetic browser with crowded tab bar, blinking cursor, and optional Cmd+W pill. Visualizes multi-tool overload.

badge_freeze_scene.description: Extreme close-up badge counter rolling 87→102 with thumb silhouette swiping in then freezing mid-swipe. The recognition trigger.

line_connection_scene.description: Two anchor points (e.g., a task card and a message card) draw a connecting mint line; both anchors highlight in sync. Use for data-flow / sync visualization.

stat_roll_scene.description: Number rolls up from 0 to target with comma separators and a unit label fade.

motion_primitives_index.checkmark_draw: SVG checkmark path stroke-dashoffset interpolation 0→full over 0.2s ease-in
motion_primitives_index.radial_ripple: Concentric circle scale 0→3 with opacity 0.6→0 over 0.8s
motion_primitives_index.spring_pop: Element scale 0→1.2→1.0 via spring(damping=14, stiffness=200) over 0.3s
motion_primitives_index.counter_roll: Numeric value interpolated start→end with Math.round per frame; spring-eased
motion_primitives_index.thumb_silhouette_swipe: SVG thumb translates from bottom into frame, swipes right, decelerates to 0 mid-swipe
motion_primitives_index.freeze_pulse: After freeze, the focal element scales 1.0→1.15→1.0 once over 0.4s
motion_primitives_index.tab_overflow: 9+ truncated tab chips in a row; '+N more' overflow indicator on the right
motion_primitives_index.cursor_blink: Cursor opacity toggles 0/1 every 16 frames (530ms at 30fps)
motion_primitives_index.keyboard_pill: Pill badge with keyboard shortcut text fades in 0.1s, holds 0.5s, fades out 0.2s
motion_primitives_index.tab_close_slide: One tab slides out right (0.25s ease-in); subsequent tabs spring-expand with 40ms stagger
motion_primitives_index.line_draw_between_anchors: Path between two anchor points draws via stroke-dashoffset over 0.4s
motion_primitives_index.mutual_highlight_pulse: Both anchor anchors highlight (border + glow) simultaneously at end of line draw
motion_primitives_index.digit_roll_up: Number animates 0→target with spring; comma separators inserted as value crosses thousands
motion_primitives_index.icon_spring_in: Icons enter via spring with stagger (idx * 1.2 frames delay)
motion_primitives_index.badge_counter_roll: Badge value interpolates start→end via Math.round; ambient glow breathes
motion_primitives_index.banner_cascade: Notification banners slide in from top, each pushing previous down
motion_primitives_index.ambient_glow_pulse: Background radial gradient breathes via Math.sin(frame / period)
motion_primitives_index.product_scale_reveal: Approved product image springs into frame with scale, glow, and depth-preserving product geometry
motion_primitives_index.timeline_playhead_sweep: A vertical timeline playhead sweeps across animated clip blocks during the hook
motion_primitives_index.workflow_chip_orbit: Workflow chips drift and spring around the product image to imply active creator work
motion_primitives_index.light_sweep: A diagonal light pass scans across the frame to prevent a static packshot feel
motion_primitives_index.panel_cascade: Workflow panels enter in staggered rows with spring translation and opacity
motion_primitives_index.progress_bar_race: Multiple progress rails fill at different speeds with visible numeric motion
motion_primitives_index.connection_line_draw: Curved connection lines draw between product and workflow panels using stroke-dashoffset
motion_primitives_index.product_parallax: Product reference image floats subtly while surrounding UI moves at a different depth
motion_primitives_index.sidebar_spring: Sidebar items translate in from left via spring (idx * 5 frame stagger)
motion_primitives_index.card_stagger: Cards scale 0.94→1.0 with stagger (idx * 8 frame stagger)
motion_primitives_index.toast_slide: Toast translates from right (440px → 0) via spring at toastDelay
motion_primitives_index.letter_spring: Each brand letter springs up (idx * 2 frame stagger) translateY(40→0)
motion_primitives_index.underline_draw: Accent underline width 0→340 via spring after letters settle
motion_primitives_index.cta_appear: CTA springs in at 2.5s in accent color
